subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which famous fort in Rajasthan was built by Raja Ratan Singh of Kachhwaha clan?
question_hi: राजस्थान में राजा रत्न सिंह के कचहवाई की श्रेष्ठ कलाकरणमूल उत्तराधिका ?
explanation_en: Kumbhalgarh Fort was built by Rana Kumbha of the Kachhwaha clan.
explanation_hi: कुभलगढ़ कलाकरणमूल राणा कुभूष के कच्छवाहन कलाकरणमूल

subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which of the following is/are the states that share their border with Rajasthan?
question_hi: राजस्थान के सांचाई के लोकी शालों के कुटकर कलाकरणमूल

subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which of the following is/are the oldest book/books in Rajasthani literature?

options.option_hi: रावाज कुनौर सिंग के तिका तिचा
